title: slab configuration schema
description: Configuration schema for @littlevoid/slab system bootstrapping and kiosk lockdown framework.

computerName.description: The target name of the computer. Leaving this empty or unchanged will skip renaming.

timezone.description: The standardized Windows Time Zone name (e.g. 'Eastern Standard Time', 'Pacific Standard Time') or 'auto' to automatically detect based on location services.

enableDailyReboot.description: Enables a scheduled task to reboot the computer daily to prevent memory leaks and maintain exhibit performance.

rebootTime.description: The time of day in HH:MM (24-hour format) when the daily reboot should occur (e.g. '03:00').

autologon.description: Configure automatic user login on Windows boot.

enabled.description: Enables automatic login for the specified username.

username.description: The local Windows account name that should automatically log in on boot (e.g. 'exhibit').

disablePasswordlessHello.description: Required on Windows 11 to disable Windows Hello passwordless credential requirements so standard Autologon works properly.

startupTask.description: Creates a scheduled task in the active user graphics session to launch the exhibit application.

enabled.description: Enables creating/managing the exhibit startup scheduled task.

workingDir.description: The working directory from which the executable should be launched.

executable.description: The command or file path to run (e.g. 'launch.bat', 'node index.js').

trigger.description: AtLogon (Recommended) runs the app in the active, visible graphical session. AtStartup runs it headlessly in background Session 0 (highly discouraged for UI apps).

delay.description: ISO 8601 duration string specifying how long to wait after boot/logon before starting the application (e.g. 'PT1M' for 1 minute, 'PT15S' for 15 seconds).

packageManager.description: Manage application installations for the system.

provider.description: The system package manager. 'winget' uses the built-in Windows 11 package manager. 'choco' uses Chocolatey. 'none' disables online package manager downloads.

allowOfflineFallback.description: If true, scans the local installers path for .msi/.exe installers and runs them silently, bypassing online downloads entirely if internet is unavailable.

localInstallersPath.description: The path to the folder containing offline silent installers, relative to the run root (e.g. '.\installers').

apps.description: List of official Winget package IDs to install when online (e.g. ['Git.Git', 'Node.js']).

lockdown.description: Deep OS lockdown options for kiosk/exhibit deployment.

disableScreensaver.description: Disables screensavers globally for all users.

disableAccessibilityShortcuts.description: Disables accessibility keyboard shortcuts (e.g. Sticky Keys, Filter Keys) to prevent visitors from bypassing the kiosk.

disableEdgeSwipes.description: Disables Edge Swipes (swiping from edge of touch screen to open notification/widget panel).

disableTouchFeedback.description: Disables visual touch circle feedback on modern Windows touchscreen devices.

disableSystemSounds.description: Disables all Windows operating system audio feedback and system event sounds (e.g. error pings, volume slider change sounds) globally.

disableWindowsUpdate.description: Writes Local Group Policy registry overrides to pause/stop automatic Windows Updates, preserving stable hardware and software states.

disableWindowsWidgets.description: Removes/disables modern Windows 11 widgets panel and taskbar widget icons to prevent visitor interaction.

disableCopilotRecall.description: Disables Windows 11 AI features including Windows Copilot and local AI data analysis (Recall) to ensure kiosk privacy.

disableOOBEPrompts.description: Disables post-update and secondary Windows Out-Of-Box Experience prompts (personalized ads, MS Account reminders).

clearDesktopIcons.description: Hides all icons on the desktop for a clean, premium visual aesthetic.

oneOf.description: Set to true to default to solid black ('#000000'), or false to skip background customization.

solidColorBackground.description: Configures a solid color desktop background (e.g., '#000000' or true) to prevent background flashes during exhibit boot/relaunch.

enableDarkMode.description: Enables Windows 11 system-wide Dark Mode by default for a clean, premium visual aesthetic.

configureExplorer.description: Configures Windows Explorer defaults (show file extensions, show hidden files, configure taskbar, hide 3D Objects/Music/Videos folders, etc.) for exhibits.

disableAppInstalls.description: Prevents Windows from auto-installing suggested and promotional consumer applications (bloatware).

disableAppRestore.description: Disables automatic restart/restoration of applications on startup after a system reboot.

disableErrorReporting.description: Disables Windows Error Reporting prompts and logs to prevent interactive dialog boxes on error.

disableFirewall.description: Disables the Windows Defender Firewall. Useful for strictly private air-gapped networks, but use with caution.

disableMaxPathLength.description: Disables the legacy 260-character path length limit (enables LongPathsEnabled).

disableNewNetworkWindow.description: Disables the 'Do you want your PC to be discoverable' network prompt when connecting to new networks.

disableNotifications.description: Disables Windows Toast Notifications and Notification Center.

disableTouchGestures.description: Disables advanced multi-finger touch gestures to prevent users from exiting the kiosk app.

enableScriptExecution.description: Enables PowerShell script execution policy to RemoteSigned.

resetTextScale.description: Resets the Windows display DPI text scaling factor to 100% to ensure correct graphical layouts.

uninstallBloatware.description: Uninstalls default Windows consumer UWP packages and provisioned bloatware.

unpinStartMenuApps.description: Unpins default pinned items from the Start Menu (supported on Windows 10 only; skipped on Windows 11).

setPowerSettings.description: Enables optimized exhibit power settings (never sleep, never turn off screen, disable hibernating).
